h41151f53g7623g4efegb0a0g5ef88a719ab6: You're the one who recruited me, Rugan.
hdb535828g9201g4afdgb324gfb7cefd7ec66: You're the one who taught me rule number one, remember?
h1badb7ecg2961g4cd3g8665g622889380b01: No. Olly didn't remember either, did you Olly?
hdbd2a671gc22bg4235gb1ccga83254947342: You're dead the moment you steal from the Zhentarim.
ha1370ba7gb75dg4180gbd57gd00c96615881: *You recall an old Zhentarim proverb coined by their founder.*
h26ff6ff9gcd85g46c3g8087g07307a7f3b80: 'Steel ends enemies, but gold makes friends.'
h1d4ecb65g2f33g4899g9ccdgeeeae2646866: You've read Manshoon. Seems you know our ways better than poor Rugan here.
h9c7e4552gb056g4e6eg90a3ge60e9d16cf9f: There's not much money in retribution, true...
h8ee33ce1g87c7g4f56gb1e0gc74c675ddc48: Tell you what: you've already taken Rugan's cargo, so finish the job and I'll let you live. Deliver it to Baldur's Gate.
hd1b5e9d0g4eb4g4425g992ag67872179f00b: Wait! WAIT! It was Olly, I SWEAR IT WAS OLLY!
h9f6e1624g5d35g4a8fg82bbg4c0cdd5c56f0: Show some respect, Rugan. The boy was loyal to you till the end.
h8b7c2c24g73f4g4f12ga9e1g24d42eb32a7f: And just like that, everyone profits.
h62c52e4fg90beg4e72gb53ag965d0fc66487: All right then, recruit - you can stock up here and be on your way. Bring the cargo to Baldur's Gate. Someone there will make contact.
hb0da03c4gcf6ag478ag8574g1e84e28a958c: |Works for me, but I don't have the cargo.|
h6a4ba3e2g0808g416egba7eg1e73efa4e238: |Works for me, but... the cargo I have is unsealed.|
h493548b7ga897g4291gaa17g6a93b8b08da5: Those explosives are sensitive - be a shame if something set them off.
hf07bc1a7g7853g4359ga239gb67a9d5c44d1: ... you bloody wouldn't! Hah. You've got guts. I respect that.
h7cec21b3g9b67g4ff4ga115g6663c137bfa1: Profit's more important than vengeance. Let's make a deal.
hd688c749gb68bg4523ga78dg3eadab0262a9: Hah! The silver tongue on you. Usually I'd rip it out, but... well, these aren't normal times.
h9294af59g1a05g455bga7a6gd6a7e6fc0568: ... you were so close. So close to walking out of this alive.
h17d4d0abg6198g48a7g89a9g3b961e497441: I've already shown I've got more wits than Rugan. Let's work together.
hf62b1943g230cg4951ga5b5gee854fba1d50: I'm going to walk out of here alive. Play it right, and so will you.
h05bcd8a8g760dg4cf7gaa65g15680b25f398: Hah - the fire in you! Maybe we wouldn't be here if Rugan had a little of that, eh?
h92aaf27bgd06bg4ddeg9370gf6b4938916c4: Oof. I got a tingle for a second there.
hf42ee390g44d1g4f88gbd46gdca3b78bd93e: I'm going to walk out of here alive. Play it right, and so will you.
ha00dfe8ag2ebfg4fbag9aa0g3fc716bac5ab: Look around for something you can use.
h172c963egf9a7g460dgb5c9g3b296b37e9f9: *You spot explosives placed around the cavern. The Zhent are ready to bring the place down.*
h00b7baf8g98a9g495cg9300gb797ccd60bf7: *You see nothing you can use. The mercenaries shift impatiently.*
h15142f4bgd06eg41e8gb251g3ad6451ce8ee: No final plea? Good - reckon I've heard enough of those today.
hdc0e3964g0172g44b2g8c91g879f6b700ec1: Can we just skip to the killing?
h7f858a36g3db5g4ee8g9ee0g5a5f52b2613f: Hah! Of course - all you had to do was ask.
h69e673ccga273g4a32g84fag7d6647b06029: You're dead the moment you steal from the Zhentarim.
